start.select_country: 🌍 Welcome! Please select your country to continue:
start.search_prompt: 🔍 Type a country name to search:
start.search_not_found: ❌ No country found for {{query}}. Please try again.

main.welcome: 📺 {{botName}} Watch live TV channels from any country directly in Telegram! Press the button below to start watching:

help.text: ℹ️ Help Commands: /start — Start the bot & select language /help — Show this help message /about — About this bot /language — Change language /ping — Check bot status How to use: 1. Press /start 2. Select your country 3. Tap 📺 Watch TV 4. Enjoy live channels! Having issues? Contact @support

about.text: 📺 {{botName}} Version: {{version}} Platform: Telegram Web App Watch live TV channels from around the world directly inside Telegram. Powered by famelack.com

errors.banned: 🚫 You have been banned from using this bot.
errors.generic: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.flood_wait: ⏳ Too many messages! Please slow down.
errors.rate_limit: ⏳ Too many requests. Please wait {{seconds}} seconds.

admin.stats_text: 📊 Statistics 👥 Users ├ Total: {{total}} ├ Today: {{today}} ├ Yesterday: {{yesterday}} ├ Weekly: {{weekly}} └ Monthly: {{monthly}} 🟢 Active ├ Today: {{activeToday}} ├ This Week: {{activeWeek}} └ This Month: {{activeMonth}} 🚫 Banned: {{banned}} ⭐ Premium: {{premium}} 💾 DB Size: {{dbSize}} ⏱ Uptime: {{uptime}} 💾 RAM: {{ram}} 🖥 CPU: {{cpu}} 📦 Version: {{version}}
admin.analytics_text: 📈 Analytics 👥 Total Users: {{total}} ⭐ Premium: {{premium}} 🚫 Banned: {{banned}} 🟢 Active Today: {{activeToday}} 📅 Active This Week: {{activeWeek}} 📆 Active This Month: {{activeMonth}}
admin.users_list: 👥 Users ({{total}} total) Select a user to view details:
admin.user_info: 👤 User Info 🆔 ID: {{id}} 👤 Name: {{name}} 📛 Username: {{username}} 🌐 Language: {{language}} 🌍 Country: {{country}} 📅 Joined: {{joinDate}} 🕐 Last Seen: {{lastSeen}} 🚫 Banned: {{banned}} ⭐ Premium: {{premium}} 📊 Actions: {{actions}}
admin.invalid_id: ❌ Invalid ID. Please enter a valid numeric ID.
admin.ban_prompt: 🚫 Enter the user ID to ban (optionally add reason after a space): Example: 123456789 spam
admin.unban_prompt: ✅ Enter the user ID to unban:
admin.search_user_prompt: 🔍 Enter user ID, username, or name to search:
admin.send_msg_content_prompt: 📨 Now send the message you want to forward to this user:
admin.broadcast_prompt:
📢 Send the message you want to broadcast to all users:

Supports: text, photo, video, audio, voice, animation, sticker, document, poll, and more.
admin.broadcast_confirm: 📢 Broadcast Confirmation Message will be sent to {{total}} users. Are you sure?
admin.broadcast_expired: ⚠️ Broadcast session expired. Please start again.
admin.backup_info: 💾 Database Backup 📁 Path: {{path}} 💾 Size: {{size}} Use a server-side backup tool to copy the database file.
admin.mandatory_info: 📡 Mandatory Channel Channel subscription enforcement is configurable. Set MANDATORY_CHANNEL in your .env file.
admin.settings_info: ⚙️ Settings 🌐 Web App: {{webAppUrl}} 🤖 Bot Name: {{botName}} 📝 Log Level: {{logLevel}} 🖥 Environment: {{nodeEnv}}
